name: Elasticsearch
description: Elasticsearch is a distributed, RESTful search and analytics engine. This container installs a single-node deployment from the official Elastic APT repository with X-Pack security disabled, so the HTTP API is served over plain http without authentication.

notes.text: X-Pack security is disabled, so the API is reachable at http://IP:9200 without authentication. Do not expose this container directly to untrusted networks.
To enable authentication, set xpack.security.enabled: true in /etc/elasticsearch/elasticsearch.yml and create passwords with /usr/share/elasticsearch/bin/elasticsearch-reset-password -u elastic.
